note: Defined canonical timeline v1 protocol DTOs and documented oqto-log authority with hstry as rebuildable projection/search layer.
Implemented foundational timeline v1 architecture: DTOs, schema extensions/projection contract/docs/tests covering this slice.

Introduced neutral oqto-protocol projection DTOs and reduced runner ChatMessageProto projector to a compatibility adapter.
Moved oqto-log projector implementation into oqto-history::oqto_log::projector; server shim now re-exports history projector and runner shim only adapts to wire DTOs.

session_name: oqto_refactor: clone to external-repos and assess whether this... [bass-bone-bill]
oqto_refactor: clone to external-repos and assess whether this... [bass-bone-bill]

note: Added pure deterministic Pi AgentMessage/native projector to canonical timeline with stable raw IDs, turn/message IDs, tool call/result parts, raw refs, and golden tests.

Added header-level 'Download session' button in ChatView that exports current session messages to markdown (.md) with role/timestamp sections and tool call/result serialization. Verified with frontend lint and build.

SessionScreen uses external chat header (ChatView header hidden), so download button was invisible. Added Download session button to SessionScreen desktop/mobile chat headers and wired event bridge to ChatView exporter. Verified frontend lint and build.
Made session markdown export control icon-only by removing text label from ChatView and SessionScreen headers. Lint passes.
Added canonical event stream assembler that deterministically converts stream/tool/error events into timeline turns with raw envelopes and final snapshot precedence.

Moved download session control into existing top-right icon row (same classes/style as plus/search/sidebar icons), kept loupe/sidebar icons intact, and removed separate desktop header download button. Lint passes.
Added oqto search timeline CLI backed by oqto-log FTS with schema_version=1 JSON output and scope handling.

changes.from: Introduce frontend/API TimelineView and TreeView projections derived from canonical timeline. Render tool_call/tool_result separately, support branch/tree navigation, preserve optimistic client_id reconciliation, and remove UI dependence on legacy ChatMessageProto quirks.
changes.to:
Introduce frontend/API TimelineView and TreeView projections derived from canonical timeline. Render tool_call/tool_result separately, support branch/tree navigation, preserve optimistic client_id reconciliation, and remove UI dependence on legacy ChatMessageProto quirks.

Progress update (2026-05-08): Reviewed /design-exploration frontend tree mock (app.jsx/graph.jsx/sidepanel.jsx/data.js). It is a strong baseline for oqto-awh9.13 (graph canvas + transcript sidepanel + head/active-branch semantics + keyboard/filter UX). Next step: integrate against canonical timeline DTOs with feature flag and remove window-global mock wiring.

Progress update (2026-05-08b): Landed first feature-flagged frontend preview slice. ChatView can show TimelineTreeView when localStorage oqto:timeline-tree-preview=1. The preview adapts current DisplayMessage data into a typed linear tree/branch transcript, preserving the design-exploration split between graph and branch transcript. Remaining work: replace linear fallback with real TimelineView/TreeView API data and wire branch checkout/fork navigation.

Completion update (2026-05-08c): DisplayMessage now preserves oqto-log parent_id/branch_id as parentId/branchId. TimelineTreeView uses real parent links when available and falls back to linear order only for legacy messages. This finishes the first production-safe frontend migration slice; future issues can replace compatibility message reads with native TimelineView API data and implement checkout/fork commands.

note: Landed feature-flagged frontend timeline/tree rendering slice that preserves oqto-log parent/branch metadata and renders a branch transcript/tree preview.
Moved mobile download action out of top tab area; now shown only inside mobile Settings tab above PiSettingsView. Desktop icon row unchanged. Lint passes.

Added oqto-history timeline_regressions integration tests covering deterministic Pi projection, raw refs, tool call/result lifecycle, failed turns, missing raw refs, hstry deep links, final snapshot precedence, and tool error event assembly.
Authoritative reload now compares oqto-log projection with Pi JSONL and uses JSONL when it is strictly richer, preserving initial user prompts missing from older/incomplete oqto-log imports.
Authoritative full reload now repairs oqto-log from Pi JSONL before returning fallback messages when JSONL is strictly richer, then re-reads oqto-log so persisted history becomes complete.
Still fixed; follow-up work moved to oqto-94d3.
Deploy remediation now sources cargo env and initializes rustup stable for sudo/root cargo fallback when release download is unavailable.
Expanded canonical timeline architecture doc with phased rollout, validation gates, rollback points, hstry projection-only cutover, shim removal criteria, and rollout metrics.

session_name: oqto_refactor: Frontend Markdown And Model Regressions [best-take-baby]
oqto_refactor: Frontend Markdown And Model Regressions [best-take-baby]
oqto_refactor: Frontend Markdown And Model Regressions [best-take-baby]

changes.to:
Frontend renders raw canonical message part JSON as plain text in chat bubbles at turn end.

## Observed
At the start of the assistant turn, raw JSON like this leaks into the chat UI:



This appears to be the raw canonical message parts array (thinking + tool_call) being displayed instead of being parsed and rendered properly by the frontend message renderer.

## Screenshots
- @uploads/IMG_8326.png — shows raw JSON at top of assistant response after user asks "What model are you ?"
- @uploads/IMG_8327.png — shows same raw JSON plus tool result sections below

## Expected
Thinking parts should render as expandable thinking blocks (or be hidden). Tool calls should render as compact tool-call pills/blocks. Raw JSON should never be visible to the user.

## Suspected area
Frontend message rendering pipeline — likely the message-to-React rendering path is falling through to a raw text display when it encounters parts it doesn't know how to render, or the message payload is being stringified and appended as text.

## Related
- oqto-dnj4 — model mismatch (same screenshots show both bugs)

session_name: oqto_refactor: Frontend Markdown And Model Regressions [best-take-baby]

changes.to:
Selected model on frontend is not respected by Pi - Pi starts with a different model than what the user selected.

## Fresh evidence (2026-05-10)
User has "MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M2.5" selected in the frontend model picker (bottom bar shows "fhgenie-preview" / "MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M2.5"), but when asked "What model are you ?", Pi reports it is running as gpt-5.3-codex (Azure Foundry) with Model ID Foundry-Codex/gpt-5.3-codex.

This is a live regression visible in production.

## Screenshots
- uploads/IMG_8326.png — model selector shows MiniMax-M2.5, user asks "What model are you ?"
- uploads/IMG_8327.png — Pi tool result replies "I am running as gpt-5.3-codex (Azure Foundry)"

## Suspected area
- Frontend model selection state not being included in the prompt command sent to runner
- Runner not passing model override to Pi startup
- Pi defaulting to a different model because OQTO_MODEL or equivalent env var is not set correctly

## Related
- oqto-xv6t — raw markdown leaking (same screenshots show both bugs)

note: Fixed frontend normalization so stringified canonical parts nested inside text parts are expanded into thinking/tool parts instead of rendering raw JSON; added regression test.

Mitigated model mismatch by applying the persisted selected model via set_model immediately before each prompt, so existing ready sessions cannot keep a stale Pi default when the UI shows a different stored selection.

session_name: oqto_refactor: OpenAI OAuth Models Not Showing [bulk-buds-glee]
oqto_refactor: OpenAI OAuth Models Not Showing [bulk-buds-glee]
note: Fixed via runner cache invalidation, built-in provider name mapping, and frontend OAuth model refresh.

Fixed oqto-log validator to count sessions by platform_id or external_id, preventing false deploy mismatches after runtime sessions are stored under oqto-* IDs. Fixed oqto-log chat projector to reconstruct thinking/tool parts from raw json_payload instead of flattening all messages to text, preserving thinking blocks after authoritative sync.
